name: Catalog
notes: Queried twice per page load: once with SKIP/TAKE for the visible page of items (CatalogFilterPaginatedSpecification), and once without pagination for the total count (CatalogFilterSpecification).
CatalogBrandId and CatalogTypeId are used as optional WHERE predicates; both are null-safe — if not supplied the WHERE clause omits that condition entirely.

name: CatalogBrands
notes: All rows fetched on every page load (no filtering) to populate the brand filter dropdown.
Sorted by Brand text in the service layer; an 'All' sentinel item with Value=null is prepended before the list is returned.

name: CatalogTypes
notes: All rows fetched on every page load (no filtering) to populate the type filter dropdown.
Sorted by Type text in the service layer; an 'All' sentinel item with Value=null is prepended before the list is returned.
